title: Register New Patient with Symptoms
description: The system shall allow a triage nurse to register a new patient and capture their symptoms for medical attention.
rationale: This requirement is necessary to ensure that patients can be properly assessed and prioritized based on the severity of their symptoms, leading to more efficient and effective medical care.
business_value: Implementing this requirement will improve patient flow through the healthcare system, reduce wait times, and ensure that patients receive appropriate treatment based on the urgency of their condition.

source.description: As a triage nurse I need to register a new patient with their symptoms So that they can be added to the queue for medical attention

acceptance_criteria: A new patient record is created in the system.
The patient's symptoms are recorded accurately.
The patient is placed in a queue based on the severity of their symptoms.
preconditions: The triage nurse is logged into the system.
The system is operational and accessible to the nurse.
postconditions: The new patient record is visible to medical staff.
The patient's queue position is updated appropriately based on symptom severity.
Notification is sent to relevant medical staff if action is required immediately.
functional_constraints: The patient's symptoms must be recorded accurately and comprehensively.
The system must automatically prioritize patients based on the severity of their symptoms.
security_requirements: All patient data must be encrypted both at rest and in transit.
Access to the registration functionality is restricted to authorized triage nurses only.

non_functional_requirements.performance: The system should process new patient registrations within 30 seconds.
non_functional_requirements.availability: The system must be available 99.9% of the time during operational hours.
non_functional_requirements.scalability: The system must support up to 50 concurrent triage nurse users without performance degradation.
non_functional_requirements.usability: Error messages should be clear and actionable, guiding the user on how to correct input errors.

edge_cases: Symptoms are entered incorrectly or ambiguously.
System fails to process registration within the expected time frame.
dependencies: Operational system availability and performance must be maintained.
Medical staff must have access to the patient queue for timely intervention.
Security protocols must ensure patient data privacy and confidentiality.

interfaces.name: Triage Nurse Registration Form
interfaces.description: The user interface where triage nurses input patient information and symptoms.

interfaces.name: Patient Database
interfaces.description: Stores new patient records with their symptoms for medical attention.

interfaces.name: Medical Attention Queue API
interfaces.description: Integrates the registration process with the queue management system, placing patients based on symptom severity.

test_cases.description: Registering a patient with no symptoms.
test_cases.expected_result: The system creates a new patient record without symptoms, and the patient is placed at the end of the queue.

test_cases.description: Registering a patient with incorrectly entered symptoms.
test_cases.expected_result: The system records the incorrect symptoms as input errors, prompting the nurse to correct them before proceeding.
The system fails to register the patient and displays an error message indicating the issue, requiring manual intervention to resolve.
